title: boronia pinnata var. citriodora
intro: Boronia pinnata var. citriodora, also known as Lemon-scented Boronia, is a flowering plant in the family Rutaceae that is native to Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Boronia pinnata var. citriodora include its ability to reduce fever, relieve congestion, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as essential oils and tinctures, are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support immune function.
